report:
(腹腔淋巴结）所送组织可见大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫或巢状分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。核分裂像易见。高MKI指数。未见明确神经原纤维。脉管内见瘤栓。
（腹腔肿物）所送组织可见神经纤维背景中散在分布的小圆形肿瘤细胞及散在或小灶分布多量成熟或部分成熟的神经节细胞。核分裂像可见。
report_ch: （腹腔淋巴结）组织可见大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫或巢状分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。核分裂像易见。脉管内见瘤栓。（腹腔肿物）组织可见神经纤维背景中散在分布的小圆形肿瘤细胞。核分裂像可见。
report_en: (Abdominal lymph nodes) The tissue shows a large number of small round tumor cells diffusely or nest-like distributed. The tumor cells have hyperchromatic nuclei and absent or scanty cytoplasm. Mitotic figures are easily observed. Tumor emboli are seen in the vessels. (Abdominal mass) The tissue reveals scattered small round tumor cells within a neurofibrous background. Mitotic figures are visible.

report: (胃小弯淋巴结)所送组织可见神经纤维背景中，大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。部分可见神经原纤维。核分裂易见，中等MKI指数。（左腹膜后）送检组织大片坏死，见小团神经母细胞瘤成分残留。
report_ch: (胃小弯淋巴结)组织可见神经纤维背景中，大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。核分裂易见。(左腹膜后)送检组织大片坏死，见小团肿瘤成分残留。
report_en: (Gastric lesser curvature lymph node) Tissue shows a large number of small round tumor cells diffusely distributed in a neurofibrillary background. The tumor cells have hyperchromatic nuclei and absent or scanty cytoplasm. Mitotic figures are easily observed. (Left retroperitoneum) The submitted tissue exhibits extensive necrosis with residual small clusters of tumor components.

report: （腹主下段髂血管旁、左肾门、右肾门、左肾静脉）所送淋巴结组织可见肿瘤组织转移，分别为2/2,3/4,1/1,1/1)。（肿瘤袋）内见淋巴结5枚，均可见肿瘤转移，另见少量节细胞神经瘤成分。（瘤旁袋）内见纤维血管组织，其间见肿瘤细胞。（右肾上腺）内见肾上腺组织，未见肿瘤细胞。（肾周）送检脂肪组织中未见肿瘤组织。（腹主动脉旁中、肝门淋巴结）未见肿瘤组织转移（分别为0/3,0/2)。
report_ch: （腹主下段髂血管旁、左肾门、右肾门、左肾静脉）淋巴结见肿瘤转移。（肿瘤袋）内淋巴结5枚均见肿瘤转移。（瘤旁袋）纤维血管组织见肿瘤细胞。（右肾上腺）未见肿瘤。（肾周）脂肪组织未见肿瘤。（腹主动脉旁中、肝门淋巴结）未见肿瘤转移。
report_en:
(Infrarenal aorta and iliac vessels, left renal hilum, right renal hilum, left renal vein) Lymph nodes show tumor metastasis.  
All 5 lymph nodes in the (tumor bag) show tumor metastasis.  
Fibrovascular tissue in the (peritumoral bag) shows tumor cells.  
(Right adrenal gland) No tumor identified.  
(Perirenal) Adipose tissue shows no tumor.  
(Mid para-aortic and hepatic hilar lymph nodes) No tumor metastasis identified.

report: (腹股沟）所送组织可见大片神经纤维背景中各发育阶段的神经母细胞散在分布，局灶见少量残存淋巴组织。（右肾门、左髂内）送检组织可见分化中的节细胞神经母细胞瘤成分，灶性坏死，纤维组织增生。可见残存淋巴滤泡结构。（瘤旁）送检为纤维、血管及脂肪组织，未见肿瘤浸润。
report_ch: （腹股沟）组织可见大片神经纤维背景中散在分布肿瘤细胞，局灶见少量残存淋巴组织。（右肾门、左髂内）送检组织可见肿瘤成分，灶性坏死，纤维组织增生。可见残存淋巴滤泡结构。（瘤旁）送检为纤维、血管及脂肪组织，未见肿瘤浸润。
report_en: (Inguinal) Tissue shows scattered tumor cells within a large area of neurofibrous background, with focal residual lymphoid tissue observed. (Right renal hilum, left internal iliac) Submitted tissues reveal tumor components, focal necrosis, and fibrous tissue hyperplasia. Residual lymphoid follicle structures are visible. (Paraneoplastic) The submitted specimen consists of fibrous, vascular, and adipose tissues, with no evidence of tumor infiltration.

report: （肝组织）及肾上腺所送组织均可见大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫或灶性分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。部分可见神经原纤维。可见核分裂。中等MKI指数。
report_ch: （肝组织）及肾上腺所送组织均可见大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫或灶性分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。可见核分裂。
report_en: (Liver tissue) and the submitted tissue from the adrenal gland both show a large number of small round tumor cells diffusely or focally distributed. The tumor cells have hyperchromatic nuclei and absent or scant cytoplasm. Mitotic figures are observed.

report: （肠系膜淋巴结）大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫或灶性分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。部分可见神经原纤维。可见大片坏死及钙化。
report_ch: （肠系膜淋巴结）大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫或灶性分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。可见大片坏死及钙化。
report_en: (Mesenteric lymph node) A large number of small round tumor cells are diffusely or focally distributed. The tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei with absent or scant cytoplasm. Extensive necrosis and calcification are observed.

report:
1袋所送组织可见成熟的纤维脂肪组织，局灶纤维增生玻变及钙化，见小灶成熟中型节细胞神经瘤成分，部分挤压严重，结构不清。另见淋巴结两枚，示窦组织细胞增生。
2袋所送组织可见纤维组织增生玻变及钙化，可见淋巴结组织，其中见成熟中型神经纤维及节细胞成分。另见脾脏组织。
report_ch:
1袋所送组织可见成熟的纤维脂肪组织，局灶纤维增生玻变及钙化，部分挤压严重，结构不清。另见淋巴结两枚，示窦组织细胞增生。
2袋所送组织可见纤维组织增生玻变及钙化，可见淋巴结组织。另见脾脏组织。
report_en:
1. The submitted tissue in the first container shows mature fibroadipose tissue with focal fibrous hyperplasia, hyaline degeneration, and calcification. Some areas are severely compressed with unclear structures. Additionally, two lymph nodes are observed, showing sinus histiocytosis.

2. The submitted tissue in the second container shows fibrous tissue hyperplasia, hyaline degeneration, and calcification. Lymph node tissue is also observed. Additionally, splenic tissue is noted.

report: 示小团穿刺组织中见几小灶异形小细胞，胞浆稀少，局部见神经毡。
report_ch: 穿刺组织中见几小灶异形小细胞，胞浆稀少。
report_en: A few small foci of atypical small cells with scant cytoplasm are seen in the puncture tissue.

report: 胸腔组织中可见大量纤维组织增生玻变，局灶见小圆形肿瘤细胞散在或灶性分布，散在瘤细胞节细胞分化。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。可见神经原纤维。核分裂未见。颈部肿瘤可见大量纤维组织增生玻变，散在少量瘤细胞浸润。胸腺左叶可见胸腺腺叶组织，未见明确肿瘤细胞残留。颈部淋巴结送检组织未见肿瘤组织（0/5)。
report_ch: 胸腔组织中可见大量纤维组织增生玻变，局灶见小圆形肿瘤细胞散在或灶性分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。核分裂未见。颈部肿瘤可见大量纤维组织增生玻变，散在少量瘤细胞浸润。胸腺左叶可见胸腺腺叶组织，未见明确肿瘤细胞残留。颈部淋巴结送检组织未见肿瘤组织。
report_en: A large amount of fibrotic tissue with hyaline degeneration is observed in the thoracic tissue, with focal areas showing scattered or clustered small round tumor cells. The tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei and absent or scant cytoplasm. No mitotic figures are observed. In the cervical tumor, extensive fibrotic tissue with hyaline degeneration is seen, with scattered infiltration of a small number of tumor cells. Thymic lobular tissue is identified in the left lobe of the thymus, with no definitive residual tumor cells detected. No tumor tissue is observed in the submitted cervical lymph node tissue.

report: “肿瘤瓶1”组织显示肿瘤组织中可见大量神经毡，神经纤维稀少。其间可见小圆形肿瘤细胞、有少量伊红色胞浆的类圆形中等大小肿瘤细胞。灶性凝固性坏死，占肿瘤组织面积约20%。脉管内可见瘤栓。细胞密集区MKI指数约3-4%。
report_ch: 肿瘤组织中可见大量神经毡，神经纤维稀少。其间可见小圆形肿瘤细胞、有少量伊红色胞浆的类圆形中等大小肿瘤细胞。灶性凝固性坏死，占肿瘤组织面积约20%。脉管内可见瘤栓。
report_en: A large amount of neuropil is observed in the tumor tissue, with sparse nerve fibers. Small round tumor cells and round to oval medium-sized tumor cells with a small amount of eosinophilic cytoplasm are visible. Focal coagulative necrosis is present, accounting for approximately 20% of the tumor tissue area. Tumor emboli are observed within the blood vessels.

report: 组织可见神经纤维背景中，大量不成熟的神经节细胞。
report_ch: 神经纤维背景中见大量不成熟细胞。
report_en: A large number of immature cells are observed in the neurofibrillary background.

report: 软组织中见大量幼稚小圆细胞弥漫分布，瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。灶性肿瘤细胞挤压明显，部分可见神经毡及神经原纤维。核分裂指数约1-2%。
report_ch: 软组织中见大量幼稚小圆细胞弥漫分布，瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。灶性肿瘤细胞挤压明显。
report_en: A large number of immature small round cells are diffusely distributed in the soft tissue, with hyperchromatic nuclei and absent or scant cytoplasm. Focal tumor cells show significant crush artifact.

report: 组织可见大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布或小灶分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。部分可见神经原纤维。可见菊形团。
report_ch: 大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布或小灶分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。可见菊形团。
report_en: A large number of small round tumor cells are diffusely distributed or arranged in small foci. The tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei and absent or scanty cytoplasm. Rosette formations are observed.

report: 组织显示大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布，大片坏死。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。可见病理性核分裂及核凋亡，中等MKI指数。可见神经原纤维。可见部分分化的神经母细胞瘤成分。另见少量肾上腺组织。右肾下腔静脉旁淋巴结、右肾下腔静脉旁淋巴结及右肾门旁淋巴结见肿瘤转移,分别为2/2,2/7,4/5。瘤旁组织见小灶肿瘤组织。
report_ch: 大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布，大片坏死。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。可见病理性核分裂及核凋亡。另见少量肾上腺组织。右肾下腔静脉旁淋巴结、右肾下腔静脉旁淋巴结及右肾门旁淋巴结见肿瘤转移,分别为2/2,2/7,4/5。瘤旁组织见小灶肿瘤组织。
report_en: A large number of small round tumor cells are diffusely distributed with extensive necrosis. The tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei and absent or scant cytoplasm. Pathological mitoses and nuclear apoptosis are observed. A small amount of adrenal tissue is also present. Tumor metastases are identified in the lymph nodes adjacent to the right renal inferior vena cava, right renal inferior vena cava, and right renal hilum, with involvement rates of 2/2, 2/7, and 4/5, respectively. Small foci of tumor tissue are observed in the peritumoral tissue.

report: 组织可见大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布，部分形成菊形团样结构。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少，部分可见神经纤维样结构。
report_ch: 大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布，部分形成菊形团样结构。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。
report_en: A large number of small round tumor cells are diffusely distributed, some forming rosette-like structures. The tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei and absent or scanty cytoplasm.

report: 组织可见大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布,局部可见神经纤维背景。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。核分裂像易见。部分可见神经原纤维。
report_ch: 大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布,局部可见神经纤维背景。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。核分裂像易见。
report_en: A large number of small round tumor cells are diffusely distributed, with a local background of neurofibrillary tissue visible. The tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei and absent or scant cytoplasm. Mitotic figures are readily observed.

report: 组织显示大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布，大片坏死及钙化。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少，明显异型，可见瘤巨细胞。局灶可见菊形团及少量神经原纤维。未见神经纤维。核分裂及凋亡易见，高MKI指数。脉管内见瘤栓。局部见残存淋巴组织及淋巴滤泡结构。
report_ch: 大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布，大片坏死及钙化。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少，明显异型，可见瘤巨细胞。局灶可见菊形团。核分裂及凋亡易见。脉管内见瘤栓。局部见残存淋巴组织及淋巴滤泡结构。
report_en: A large number of small round tumor cells are diffusely distributed, with extensive necrosis and calcification. The tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei, absent or scanty cytoplasm, significant atypia, and occasional tumor giant cells. Focal rosette formations are observed. Mitotic figures and apoptosis are readily seen. Tumor emboli are present within blood vessels. Residual lymphoid tissue and lymphoid follicle structures are noted locally.

report: 组织可见大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。其间大量坏死。瘤细胞胞浆稀少，核染色质丰富。局灶可见神经原纤维。MKI指数约3%。
report_ch: 大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布，其间大量坏死。瘤细胞胞浆稀少，核染色质丰富。
report_en: A large number of small round tumor cells are diffusely distributed, with extensive necrosis in between. The tumor cells have scant cytoplasm and abundant nuclear chromatin.

report: 组织可见大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布,可见大片坏死。瘤细胞核浓染，细胞小到中等大，胞浆缺如或稀少，病理性核分裂像易见。未见明确神经原纤维。
report_ch: 大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布,可见大片坏死。瘤细胞核浓染，细胞小到中等大，胞浆缺如或稀少，病理性核分裂像易见。
report_en: A large number of small round tumor cells are diffusely distributed, with extensive necrosis visible. The tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei, are small to medium in size, and have absent or scanty cytoplasm. Pathological mitotic figures are readily observed.

report: 组织显示大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布，局部可见神经丝分化。大部分瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少，部分细胞可见嗜酸性核仁。核分裂指数<2%。
report_ch: 大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布，局部可见神经丝分化。大部分瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少，部分细胞可见嗜酸性核仁。
report_en: A large number of small round tumor cells are diffusely distributed, with focal evidence of neurofilament differentiation. Most tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei and absent or scanty cytoplasm, with some cells showing eosinophilic nucleoli.

report: 组织可见大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞胞浆稀少或缺如，核染色质丰富。可见神经原纤维。核分裂像可见。低MKI指数。淋巴结可见肿瘤组织转移。阑尾充血水肿，浆膜少量急慢性炎症细胞浸润。
report_ch: 大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布，胞浆稀少，核染色质丰富，核分裂像可见。淋巴结见肿瘤转移。阑尾充血水肿，浆膜少量急慢性炎症细胞浸润。
report_en: A large number of small round tumor cells are diffusely distributed, with scant cytoplasm, abundant nuclear chromatin, and visible mitotic figures. Tumor metastasis is observed in the lymph nodes. The appendix shows congestion and edema, with a small number of acute and chronic inflammatory cells infiltrating the serosa.

report: 所送组织可见大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。大部分瘤细胞胞浆稀少，核染色质丰富。局灶可见神经纤维及分化较好的神经节细胞。灶性坏死。核分裂像1-2%。“肝门淋巴结”、“胃小弯淋巴结”及“血管旁淋巴结”结构破坏，可见肿瘤细胞浸润。“大网膜”组织水肿，未见肿瘤细胞。
report_ch: 大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布，瘤细胞胞浆稀少，核染色质丰富。灶性坏死。肝门淋巴结、胃小弯淋巴结及血管旁淋巴结结构破坏，可见肿瘤细胞浸润。大网膜组织水肿，未见肿瘤细胞。
report_en: A large number of small round tumor cells are diffusely distributed, with scanty cytoplasm and abundant nuclear chromatin. Focal necrosis is present. The structure of the hepatic hilar lymph nodes, lesser curvature lymph nodes of the stomach, and perivascular lymph nodes is disrupted, with tumor cell infiltration observed. The omentum shows tissue edema, and no tumor cells are identified.

report: 组织可见大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞胞浆稀少，核染色质丰富。局灶可见神经原纤维及菊形团。血管腔内可见瘤栓。高核分裂指数，约4-5%。肾盂壁可见肿瘤细胞，未见突破。输尿管壁未见肿瘤细胞。
report_ch: 大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布，胞浆稀少，核染色质丰富。局灶可见神经原纤维及菊形团。血管腔内可见瘤栓。肾盂壁可见肿瘤细胞，未见突破。输尿管壁未见肿瘤细胞。

A small portion of the tumor cells are small and round, arranged in rosette patterns, with dense nuclear staining and visible intravascular invasion. Scattered tumor cells exhibit abundant cytoplasm and visible nucleoli.

report_en: Adrenal Gland: The submitted tissue shows congestion and edema, with no definite tumor tissue identified. Tumor: The tissue reveals abundant small round tumor cells with hyperchromatic nuclei, absent or scant cytoplasm, and the presence of neuropil. Focal necrosis and calcification are observed, along with hyaline degeneration and foam cell formation. The necrotic area accounts for approximately 30-40% of the section. Abdominal Aorta: Tumor tissue is identified in the submitted specimen.

report: 组织显示肾上腺旁肿瘤组织坏死明显。可见神经纤维背景中散在或小片状分布的小圆形肿瘤细胞，肿瘤细胞变性坏死。散在成熟或部分成熟的神经节细胞。所送“腔静脉淋巴结”为肿瘤组织，大部分坏死，仅见少量神经纤维及散在变性的肿瘤细胞。所送“肾门淋巴结”结构完整，未见肿瘤细胞。

report_en: Adrenal paraganglioma tissue shows significant necrosis. Scattered or small clusters of small round tumor cells are observed within a neurofibrillary background, with tumor cell degeneration and necrosis. The vena cava lymph node contains tumor tissue, mostly necrotic, with only a small amount of neurofibrillary tissue and scattered degenerated tumor cells. The renal hilar lymph node structure is intact, with no tumor cells observed.

report: 4块组织均可见淋巴结结构破坏。大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。绝大部分瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆稀少。个别肿瘤细胞胞浆丰富，可见核仁，此类细胞占肿瘤细胞比例<5%。可见菊形团及神经元纤维。神经纤维少。
report_ch: 4块组织均可见淋巴结结构破坏。大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。绝大部分瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆稀少。个别肿瘤细胞胞浆丰富，可见核仁，此类细胞占肿瘤细胞比例<5%。
report_en: All four tissue specimens show destruction of lymph node architecture. There is diffuse infiltration by numerous small round tumor cells. The majority of tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei with scant cytoplasm. Individual tumor cells display abundant cytoplasm and visible nucleoli, accounting for <5% of the total tumor cell population.

report: 组织显示大片神经纤维背景中分布不同程度分化的节细胞，另见结节状神经毡中大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。部分可见菊形团及神经原纤维。MKI指数低。

report_en: Amidst a background of extensive neurofibers, cells with varying degrees of differentiation are distributed. Additionally, a large number of small round tumor cells are diffusely distributed in nodular structures. The tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei and absent or scant cytoplasm. Some rosettes and neurofibrils are observed.

report: 组织显示大量坏死组织间多灶肿瘤细胞团。瘤细胞小圆形，胞浆稀少，核染色质致密。核分裂指数约3%。菊形团及神经原纤维可见。神经纤维稀少，所占面积<5%。

report_en: Amidst extensive necrotic tissue, multiple foci of tumor cell clusters are observed. The tumor cells are small and round, with scant cytoplasm and dense nuclear chromatin. The mitotic index is approximately 3%.

report_ch: 致密的结缔组织中大量小圆形肿瘤细胞呈团状分布。可见多灶挤压细胞。部分出血、坏死。
report_en: Dense connective tissue contains numerous small round tumor cells arranged in clusters. Multiple foci of crushed cells are visible. There is partial hemorrhage and necrosis.

report: 小袋中组织显示软组织中小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆稀少。部分可见神经原纤维。大袋中组织显示肾上腺组织周围多灶肿瘤细胞浸润。
report_ch: 软组织中小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆稀少。肾上腺组织周围多灶肿瘤细胞浸润。
report_en: Diffuse distribution of small round tumor cells in soft tissue. The tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei and scant cytoplasm. Multifocal tumor infiltration is observed around the adrenal tissue.

report: 组织显示弥漫性坏死伴钙化，坏死组织占切片面积约>85%。含铁血黄素沉积。局部见小灶肿瘤细胞。边缘见少许肾上腺组织。送检淋巴结未见明确肿瘤组织。
report_ch: 弥漫性坏死伴钙化，坏死组织占切片面积约>85%。含铁血黄素沉积。局部见小灶肿瘤细胞。边缘见少许肾上腺组织。送检淋巴结未见明确肿瘤组织。
report_en: Diffuse necrosis with calcification, necrotic tissue accounting for approximately >85% of the section area. Hemosiderin deposition. Small foci of tumor cells are observed locally. A small amount of adrenal tissue is seen at the margins. No definite tumor tissue is identified in the submitted lymph nodes.

report: 组织显示弥漫或巢团状分布的小圆形肿瘤细胞。瘤细胞胞浆稀少，核浓染。核分裂可见，中等MKI指数，约2-4%。可见神经毡结构。可见部分为分化型神经母细胞瘤成分（所占面积约20-30%）。神经纤维约占切片面积10-20%，可见少量淋巴组织残留。
report_ch: 弥漫或巢团状分布的小圆形肿瘤细胞，胞浆稀少，核浓染。核分裂可见。可见神经毡结构。神经纤维约占切片面积10-20%，可见少量淋巴组织残留。
report_en: Diffuse or nested clusters of small round tumor cells with scant cytoplasm and hyperchromatic nuclei. Mitotic figures are present. Neuropil-like structures are visible. Nerve fibers account for approximately 10-20% of the section area, with a small amount of residual lymphoid tissue observed.

report: 组织显示弥漫分布的小圆形肿瘤细胞。瘤细胞胞浆稀少，核浓染。局灶可见少量神经毡结构。神经纤维稀少（所占面积<5%）。MKI指数约3%。
report_ch: 弥漫分布的小圆形肿瘤细胞，胞浆稀少，核浓染。局灶可见少量神经毡结构。
report_en: Diffusely distributed small round tumor cells with scant cytoplasm and hyperchromatic nuclei. Focal presence of a small amount of neuropil.

report: 组织显示弥漫分布的小圆形肿瘤细胞。瘤细胞胞浆稀少，核浓染。局灶可见菊形团及神经毡结构。未见明确神经纤维。MKI指数约5%。
report_ch: 弥漫分布的小圆形肿瘤细胞，胞浆稀少，核浓染。局灶可见菊形团及神经毡结构。
report_en: Diffusely distributed small round tumor cells with scant cytoplasm and hyperchromatic nuclei. Focal rosette formations and neuropil-like structures are observed.

report: 组织显示弥漫分布的小圆形肿瘤细胞。瘤细胞胞浆稀少，核染色质致密。

report_en: Diffusely distributed small round tumor cells with scanty cytoplasm and dense nuclear chromatin.

report: 组织显示弥漫分布的小圆形肿瘤细胞。瘤细胞胞浆稀少，核浓染。多见神经毡及菊形团结构。神经纤维稀少。MKI指数1-2%。
report_ch: 弥漫分布的小圆形肿瘤细胞，胞浆稀少，核浓染。多见神经毡及菊形团结构。
report_en: Diffusely distributed small round tumor cells with scanty cytoplasm and hyperchromatic nuclei. Frequent neuropil and rosette formations are observed.

report: 组织可见大片纤维化玻变及多灶钙化，神经纤维背景中散在或小片状分布的小圆形肿瘤细胞。散在成熟或部分成熟的神经节细胞。核分裂像少见。局灶见小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布，可见残留淋巴结组织。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。多条脉管内见瘤栓。肝门旁肿瘤所送组织为肿瘤组织，为成熟中型节细胞神经瘤成分。肝门旁淋巴结见肿瘤转移（4/4)。左侧髂血管旁淋巴结见肿瘤转移（9/9)。右侧髂血管旁淋巴结见肿瘤转移（3/3)。左侧肾门淋巴结见肿瘤转移（1/1)。腹主动脉旁淋巴结见肿瘤转移（12/12)。隔脊角肿瘤见肿瘤组织，为节细胞神经瘤成分。
report_ch: 大片纤维化玻变及多灶钙化，神经纤维背景中散在或小片状分布的小圆形肿瘤细胞。核分裂像少见。局灶见小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布，可见残留淋巴结组织。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。多条脉管内见瘤栓。肝门旁肿瘤为成熟中型节细胞神经瘤成分。肝门旁淋巴结、左侧髂血管旁淋巴结、右侧髂血管旁淋巴结、左侧肾门淋巴结、腹主动脉旁淋巴结均见肿瘤转移。隔脊角肿瘤为节细胞神经瘤成分。
report_en: Extensive fibrosis with hyaline degeneration and multifocal calcification, with scattered or small clusters of small round tumor cells distributed within the neurofibrillary background. Mitotic figures are rare. Focal areas show diffuse distribution of small round tumor cells, with residual lymph node tissue visible. The tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei and absent or scant cytoplasm. Multiple vascular tumor emboli are observed. The tumor near the hepatic portal consists of mature intermediate ganglion cell neuroma components. Tumor metastases are present in the lymph nodes near the hepatic portal, left iliac vessels, right iliac vessels, left renal hilum, and para-aortic region. The tumor at the diaphragmatic crus consists of ganglion cell neuroma components.

report_ch: 大量纤维增生、玻变，小圆形肿瘤细胞灶性或片状分布。瘤细胞核浓染，异型明显，胞浆缺如或稀少。可见大片坏死及泡沫细胞形成，局灶含铁血黄素沉积。另见囊壁样组织，未见内衬上皮，壁上见胰腺组织，局灶见肿瘤组织累及。瘤旁纤维血管组织未见肿瘤累及。
report_en: Extensive fibrous proliferation with hyaline degeneration, and small round tumor cells distributed in focal or sheet-like patterns. The tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei, significant atypia, and absent or scant cytoplasm. Large areas of necrosis and foam cell formation are observed, with focal hemosiderin deposition. Additionally, cyst wall-like tissue is seen without lining epithelium, with pancreatic tissue present on the wall and focal involvement by tumor tissue. The adjacent fibrovascular tissue shows no tumor involvement.

report: 组织显示大片纤维组织增生玻变，局灶坏死钙化，另见大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫或结节状分布，部分瘤细胞节细胞分化，核分裂偶见。部分区域见神经纤维组织，其间见分化中神经母细胞灶性分布。局灶脉管内见瘤栓。可见淋巴结内肿瘤组织。局灶见少量肾上腺组织。膈肌角淋巴结、髂血管旁淋巴结、腹主动脉袋内淋巴结、左右肾门旁淋巴结袋见肿瘤组织转移，分别为（2/2，3/4，3/6，2/2，1/3)。肠系膜病灶见成熟粗大神经丛组织及小灶节细胞神经瘤成分。肾周脂肪充血出血，未见肿瘤组织累及。
report_ch: 大片纤维组织增生玻变，局灶坏死钙化，见大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫或结节状分布，核分裂偶见。局灶脉管内见瘤栓。可见淋巴结内肿瘤组织。局灶见少量肾上腺组织。膈肌角、髂血管旁、腹主动脉、左右肾门旁淋巴结见肿瘤转移。肠系膜病灶见神经丛组织及神经瘤成分。肾周脂肪充血出血，未见肿瘤累及。
report_en: Extensive fibrous tissue proliferation with hyaline degeneration, focal necrosis and calcification, with numerous small round tumor cells diffusely or nodularly distributed, occasional mitotic figures observed. Focal tumor emboli are seen within blood vessels. Tumor tissue is identified within lymph nodes. A small amount of adrenal tissue is observed focally. Tumor metastases are noted in the lymph nodes of the diaphragmatic crura, adjacent to the iliac vessels, around the abdominal aorta, and near the left and right renal hila. The mesenteric lesion shows components of neural plexus and neuroma. Perirenal fat exhibits congestion and hemorrhage, with no evidence of tumor involvement.

report_en: Extensive fibrous tissue proliferation with hyaline degeneration, focal necrosis and calcification, with numerous small round tumor cells diffusely or nodularly distributed, occasional mitotic figures observed. Focal tumor emboli are seen within blood vessels. Tumor tissue is identified within lymph nodes. A small amount of adrenal tissue is observed focally. Tumor metastasis is present in the lymph nodes of the diaphragmatic crus, alongside the iliac vessels, within the aortic pouch, and adjacent to the bilateral renal hila. Mature coarse nerve plexus tissue is observed in the mesenteric lesion. Perirenal fat shows congestion and hemorrhage, with no tumor tissue involvement.

report: 组织可见大量出血坏死。多灶小圆形肿瘤细胞团状分布，瘤细胞胞浆稀少，核染色质丰富。多灶分化成熟，或部分成熟的神经节细胞，在肿瘤细胞中比例>5%。未见明确神经母细胞与神经节细胞移行带。神经纤维可见，因出血坏死，计数面积困难。肾脏、肾盂、输尿管及肾上腺中均未见肿瘤细胞。所送“1号淋巴结”为软组织，未见肿瘤细胞。“2号淋巴结”组织中可见4枚淋巴结，均可见Syn及CgA阳性的肿瘤细胞浸润。
report_ch: 大量出血坏死。多灶小圆形肿瘤细胞团状分布，瘤细胞胞浆稀少，核染色质丰富。多灶分化成熟。神经纤维可见。肾脏、肾盂、输尿管及肾上腺中均未见肿瘤细胞。送检淋巴结中可见肿瘤细胞浸润。
report_en: Extensive hemorrhage and necrosis. Multifocal small round tumor cells arranged in clusters, with scanty cytoplasm and abundant nuclear chromatin. Multifocal areas of mature differentiation. Nerve fibers are visible. No tumor cells are observed in the kidney, renal pelvis, ureter, or adrenal gland. Tumor cell infiltration is present in the submitted lymph nodes.

report_en: Extensive hemorrhage is observed in the tissue, with small round tumor cells distributed focally or in sheets. The tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei and absent or scant cytoplasm. Tumor emboli are present within the blood vessels. No tumor involvement is seen in the adrenal tissue. No tumor metastasis is detected in the abdominal aortic lymph nodes. Tumor metastasis is identified in the renal hilar lymph nodes. A small amount of tumor cell infiltration is noted in the perirenal adipose tissue.

report_ch: 大片出血，纤维组织增生、玻变，可见大片小圆形肿瘤细胞，瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少，可见神经毡。瘤细胞异型明显。玻变出血区域约占送检组织30-40%。
report_en: Extensive hemorrhage, fibrous tissue hyperplasia, and hyaline degeneration are observed. Large sheets of small round tumor cells are visible, with hyperchromatic nuclei and absent or scant cytoplasm. Neuropil is present. The tumor cells exhibit significant atypia. The areas of hyaline degeneration and hemorrhage account for approximately 30-40% of the submitted tissue.

report_ch: 纤维组织增生、玻变，部分区域坏死钙化，可见神经纤维背景中，大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫或灶性分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。

A large number of small round tumor cells are diffusely or focally distributed within the neurofibromatous background. The tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei and absent or scant cytoplasm.

report: 组织可见纤维组织增生、玻变，部分区域坏死钙化，可见神经纤维背景中，大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫或灶性分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。可见神经原纤维。部分区域见节细胞神经瘤成分。
report_ch: 纤维组织增生、玻变，部分区域坏死钙化，可见神经纤维背景中，大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫或灶性分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。

report_en: Fibrous tissue shows numerous focally distributed neuropil and a small number of slightly larger tumor cells.

report:

右纵隔：所送组织显示肿瘤组织富含小圆形肿瘤细胞，瘤细胞核浓染，部分出血、坏死及钙化，局部含铁血黄素沉积，坏死组织约占切片面积50-60%。

report_ch: 送检纤维组织中见肿瘤细胞，伴出血坏死。右纵隔组织显示肿瘤组织富含小圆形肿瘤细胞，瘤细胞核浓染，部分出血、坏死及钙化，局部含铁血黄素沉积，坏死组织约占切片面积50-60%。
report_en: Fibrous tissue submitted for examination shows tumor cells with hemorrhage and necrosis. The right mediastinal tissue reveals tumor tissue rich in small round tumor cells, with hyperchromatic nuclei, partial hemorrhage, necrosis, and calcification. Local hemosiderin deposition is present, and necrotic tissue accounts for approximately 50-60% of the sectional area.

report: 组织可见纤维、脂肪及血管肌肉组织，局灶可见少量部分分化的神经母细胞呈巢团状分布，边界不清。另见三枚淋巴结，其中未见肿瘤组织。
report_ch: 纤维、脂肪及血管肌肉组织，局灶可见少量部分分化的细胞呈巢团状分布，边界不清。另见三枚淋巴结，其中未见肿瘤组织。
report_en: Fibrous, adipose, and vascular muscle tissue, with focal areas showing small nests of partially differentiated cells with indistinct borders. Additionally, three lymph nodes are observed, with no tumor tissue identified.

report: 组织可见神经纤维背景中散在神经节细胞，少部分神经节细胞处于分化中。局灶肾上腺包膜见肿瘤侵犯。未见明确神经母细胞。

report_en: Focal invasion of the adrenal capsule by tumor is observed within the neurofibrous background.

report: 组织可见神经纤维背景中灶性成熟或部分成熟的神经节细胞。灶性神经毡中散在或小片状分布小圆形肿瘤细胞。MKI指数低。
report_ch: 神经纤维背景中灶性成熟细胞。灶性神经毡中散在或小片状分布小圆形肿瘤细胞。
report_en: Focal mature cells in the neurofibrillary background. Small round tumor cells scattered or distributed in small patches within the focal neuropil.

report: 组织可见大量神经原纤维背景中见灶性成熟性神经节细胞及成熟中的神经节细胞。
report_ch: 大量神经原纤维背景中见灶性成熟性神经节细胞。
report_en: Focal mature ganglion cells are observed within a background of abundant neurofibrillary tangles.

report: 组织显示肿瘤组织灶性坏死，纤维组织增生。瘤细胞呈小圆形。小片状分布。可见神经原纤维。神经纤维较少。

report_en: Focal necrosis of tumor tissue with fibrous tissue proliferation. The tumor cells are small and round, distributed in small patches.

report: 组织显示肾上腺旁灶性小圆形肿瘤细胞分布。部分瘤细胞与肾上腺似有移行。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆稀少。部分可见神经原纤维。可见少量神经纤维。核分裂指数<2%。
report_ch: 肾上腺旁灶性小圆形肿瘤细胞分布。部分瘤细胞与肾上腺似有移行。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆稀少。
report_en: Focal small round tumor cell distribution adjacent to the adrenal gland. Some tumor cells appear to transition into the adrenal gland. The tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei and scant cytoplasm.

report: 组织显示骨组织见灶性小圆形肿瘤细胞呈团状分布。瘤细胞胞浆少，核浓染。未见神经纤维及神经毡结构。灶性坏死。
report_ch: 骨组织见灶性小圆形肿瘤细胞呈团状分布。瘤细胞胞浆少，核浓染。灶性坏死。
report_en: Focal small round tumor cells are distributed in clusters in the bone tissue. The tumor cells have scant cytoplasm and hyperchromatic nuclei. Focal necrosis is present.

report:
组织显示灶性小圆形肿瘤细胞片状分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。部分可见神经原纤维。其余组织见大量纤维组织增生及灶性钙化（约30%）。另见散在神经纤维背景中分布不同程度分化的神经节细胞。肿瘤内一小血管内瘤栓形成。邻近淋巴结见肿瘤转移（4/6）。

report_ch: 灶性小圆形肿瘤细胞片状分布，核浓染，胞浆稀少。可见纤维组织增生及灶性钙化。小血管内瘤栓形成。邻近淋巴结见肿瘤转移。
report_en: Focal small round tumor cells are distributed in sheets, with hyperchromatic nuclei and scant cytoplasm. Fibrous tissue proliferation and focal calcification are observed. Tumor emboli are present within small blood vessels. Tumor metastasis is noted in adjacent lymph nodes.

report: 组织可见灶性肿瘤凝固性坏死、偶见小灶钙化。神经纤维背景中散在或小片状分布的小圆形肿瘤细胞，件较多成熟或部分成熟的神经节细胞。
report_ch: 灶性肿瘤凝固性坏死、偶见小灶钙化。神经纤维背景中散在或小片状分布的小圆形肿瘤细胞。
report_en: Focal tumor coagulative necrosis, with occasional small foci of calcification. Small round tumor cells are scattered or distributed in small patches within the neurofibrillary background.

report_ch: 散碎组织显示大量出血坏死，其间见散在小团状分布肿瘤组织，富含小圆形肿瘤细胞，瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。

report_ch: 散碎组织显示丰富的神经纤维背景中，见散在或灶性分布的细胞。部分细胞分化成熟，部分细胞未完全成熟。

The second submitted tissue reveals small round tumor cells and cells at various stages of differentiation, either scattered or arranged in small nests within a neurofibrillary background. Mitotic figures are rare.

report: 冰冻组织及冰余组织可见大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。部分可见神经原纤维。可见病理核分裂像。低-中MKI指数。局灶见少量淋巴细胞。
report_ch: 冰冻组织及冰余组织可见大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。部分可见病理核分裂像。局灶见少量淋巴细胞。

report_ch: 节细胞神经瘤背景中见神经母细胞瘤结节，界限清楚，结节内弥漫或小片状分布的小圆形肿瘤细胞。核分裂像可见。另见栓线软组织均为节细胞神经瘤成分。

report: 所送组织可见神经胶质中大量部分分化及分化较成熟的神经节细胞。局灶可见团块状钙化及小圆形肿瘤细胞。

report_en: Glial tissue shows partially differentiated and relatively mature cells. Focal areas exhibit clumped calcification and small round tumor cells.

report: 组织可见丰富神经纤维背景中，大量中等分化肿瘤细胞及少量高分化肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。可见﹤10%肿瘤组织坏死及灶性钙化。
report_ch: 丰富神经纤维背景中，大量中等分化肿瘤细胞及少量高分化肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。可见少量肿瘤组织坏死及灶性钙化。

The tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei with absent or scant cytoplasm. A small amount of tumor tissue necrosis and focal calcification are observed.

report: 组织显示大片坏死及灶性钙化、纤维化背景中见灶性小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。神经纤维稀少。
report_ch: 大片坏死及灶性钙化、纤维化背景中见灶性小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。
report_en: In a background of extensive necrosis, focal calcification, and fibrosis, focal small round tumor cells are diffusely distributed. The tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei and absent or scant cytoplasm.

report: 组织可见大片神经纤维背景中散在小片状分布的小圆形肿瘤细胞。另见多量散在成熟或部分成熟的神经节细胞。核分裂像罕见。

report_en: In a background of large sheets of neurofibers, small round tumor cells are scattered in small patchy distributions. Mitotic figures are rare.

report: 组织可见多灶大片坏死组织背景中，大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。可见神经原纤维及小灶钙化。MKI指数低。
report_ch: 多灶大片坏死组织背景中，大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。可见小灶钙化。
report_en: In a background of multifocal and extensive necrotic tissue, numerous small round tumor cells are diffusely distributed. The tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei and absent or scant cytoplasm. Small foci of calcification are observed.

report: 组织可见坏死及神经纤维（约占肿瘤组织50%）背景中，较多中等体积大小圆形肿瘤细胞散在分布。瘤细胞胞浆红染、浓缩，核大，部分可见核仁。神经原纤维明显。核分裂指数<2%。所送“肠系膜下动脉旁组织、下腔静脉旁组织、腹主动脉旁组织、脊柱旁组织、肠系膜上动脉旁组织、胰尾病变组织”均可见肿瘤细胞浸润。
report_ch: 坏死及纤维背景中，较多中等体积圆形肿瘤细胞散在分布。瘤细胞胞浆红染、浓缩，核大，部分可见核仁。核分裂指数<2%。肠系膜下动脉旁、下腔静脉旁、腹主动脉旁、脊柱旁、肠系膜上动脉旁及胰尾病变组织均可见肿瘤细胞浸润。
report_en: In a background of necrosis and fibrosis, numerous medium-sized round tumor cells are scattered. The tumor cells exhibit eosinophilic cytoplasm, condensation, large nuclei, and some show visible nucleoli. The mitotic index is <2%. Tumor cell infiltration is observed in tissues adjacent to the inferior mesenteric artery, inferior vena cava, abdominal aorta, paravertebral region, superior mesenteric artery, and pancreatic tail lesions.

report: 组织显示丰富的神经纤维背景中，多灶成熟和欠成熟的神经节细胞。可见多灶淋巴细胞浸润。未见神经母细胞及神经毡结构。MKI指数<1%。

Focal clusters of atypical cells with eosinophilic cytoplasm and unclear structural features are observed. Adrenal compression is noted, along with a small amount of liver tissue. No tumor tissue penetration is seen in the renal pelvis. The submitted liver tissue shows hepatocellular edema, compressed and occluded sinusoids. report_ch: 大部分区域显示神经纤维稀少，小圆形肿瘤细胞呈片分布，可见神经毡及菊形团结构。局灶见结节状结构内神经纤维丰富，占结节面积约70%。

report_ch: 巴结均大部分结构被肿瘤取代，大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。灶性钙化。淋巴结肿瘤转移（15/16）

report:

肾门淋巴结：淋巴结见肿瘤转移（约为2/2）。
肠系膜淋巴结：淋巴结见肿瘤转移（约为2/2）伴化疗后反应。

report_ch: 多灶出血、坏死，占切片面积约30-40%。灶性小圆形肿瘤细胞片状分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。其余组织见大量纤维组织增生（约10-20%）。肿瘤边缘见少量肾脏组织。残留肾盂、肾切缘、输尿管切缘均未见肿瘤组织。肾门淋巴结及肠系膜淋巴结见肿瘤转移伴化疗后反应。
report_en: Multifocal hemorrhage and necrosis, accounting for approximately 30-40% of the section area. Focal sheets of small round tumor cells are distributed. The tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei with absent or scant cytoplasm. The remaining tissue shows extensive fibrous tissue hyperplasia (approximately 10-20%). A small amount of renal tissue is observed at the tumor margin. No tumor tissue is identified in the residual renal pelvis, renal resection margin, or ureteral resection margin. Tumor metastasis with post-chemotherapy response is noted in the renal hilar lymph nodes and mesenteric lymph nodes.

report:
组织可见多灶坏死。坏死组织占切片面积约30-40%。可见多灶钙化。大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。可见少许病理性核分裂。边缘可见少许肾上腺组织。
瘤旁：可见少许肿瘤组织及钙化。
肾上腺：送检少许肾上腺，未见明确肿瘤组织。
肾门淋巴结：送检散碎组织，部分坏死，淋巴结可见肿瘤组织转移（约为5/5）。

Numerous small round tumor cells are diffusely distributed, with hyperchromatic nuclei and scant cytoplasm, and a few pathological mitoses are observed. A small amount of adrenal tissue is seen at the margins. Adjacent to the tumor, some tumor tissue and calcification are noted. No definite tumor tissue is identified in the adrenal gland. Tumor metastasis is observed in the renal hilar lymph nodes.

report_en: Retroperitoneal and mediastinal tissues show fibrous tissue proliferation with hyaline degeneration, extensive necrosis, and calcification. In some areas, a large number of small round tumor cells are diffusely distributed, with hyperchromatic nuclei and absent or scant cytoplasm. Nerve fibers are sparse, and mitotic figures are rare. Tumor emboli are observed within blood vessels. Spinal canal tissue consists of scattered fragments of ganglioneuroma components. Tumor metastasis is identified in the para-aortic lymph nodes of the lower abdomen.

The tumor cells have hyperchromatic nuclei and absent or scant cytoplasm. In some areas, rosettes and neurofibrils are observed. Approximately 50-60% of the area shows tumor necrosis, fibrous tissue proliferation, and focal calcification.

肝：送检肝组织显示部分肝细胞胞质疏松浅染。可见多灶异型细胞，周围纤维组织增生，较多急慢性炎症细胞浸润。局部门管区管腔扩张。小胆管增生。
report_ch: 腹膜后肿瘤：送检组织显示多灶出血、坏死出血及纤维组织增生伴玻变，坏死及纤维组织增生占切片面积约50-60%。灶性小圆形肿瘤细胞片状分布。局部见少许肾上腺组织。肾周脂肪：送检脂肪组织充血水肿，未见明确肿瘤组织。瘤旁：未见明确肿瘤组织。腹主动脉旁淋巴结：送检纤维血管及散碎淋巴结组织，局灶钙化。少许脉管内见肿瘤组织。淋巴结内见异型细胞伴化疗后反应。肝：送检肝组织显示部分肝细胞胞质疏松浅染。可见多灶异型细胞，周围纤维组织增生，较多急慢性炎症细胞浸润。局部门管区管腔扩张。小胆管增生。
report_en: Retroperitoneal Tumor: The submitted tissue shows multifocal hemorrhage, necrotic hemorrhage, and fibrous tissue hyperplasia with hyaline degeneration. Necrosis and fibrous tissue hyperplasia account for approximately 50-60% of the section area. Focal small round tumor cells are distributed in sheets. A small amount of adrenal tissue is observed locally. Perirenal Fat: The submitted adipose tissue shows congestion and edema, with no definite tumor tissue identified. Paraneoplastic Area: No definite tumor tissue is observed. Para-aortic Lymph Nodes: The submitted fibrovascular and fragmented lymph node tissues show focal calcification. Tumor tissue is observed in some vessels. Atypical cells with post-chemotherapy changes are seen in the lymph nodes. Liver: The submitted liver tissue shows partial hepatocytes with loose and lightly stained cytoplasm. Multiple foci of atypical cells are observed, surrounded by fibrous tissue hyperplasia and significant infiltration of acute and chronic inflammatory cells. Local portal areas show dilated lumens. Bile duct proliferation is noted.

report_en: Severe tissue hemorrhage is observed, with small round tumor cells scattered or arranged in nests, accounting for approximately 30% of the section area. The tumor cells are sparsely distributed, with hyperchromatic nuclei and absent or scant cytoplasm. A small amount of adrenal tissue is also noted. Hepatic tissue shows fibrous hyperplasia and hyaline degeneration, with scattered or nested tumor cells distributed within, occupying approximately 10-20% of the liver section area. The tissue adjacent to the left retroperitoneal tumor consists of adipose tissue, with no tumor involvement detected. Tumor metastasis is observed in the hepatic hilar lymph nodes. Tumor metastasis is also noted in the lymph nodes adjacent to the inferior vena cava. No tumor metastasis is found in the mesenteric lymph nodes.

No tumor is seen in the liver tissue at the resection margin.

report_en: The liver tissue shows diffuse distribution of small round tumor cells, with no pathological mitoses observed. Hepatocytes exhibit diffuse edema, sinusoid occlusion, proliferation of small bile ducts in the portal areas, and infiltration of numerous lymphocytes. Scattered small clusters of tumor tissue are visible. The hepatic lymph nodes show sinus dilation, histiocyte hyperplasia, and atrophy of lymphoid follicles, with no definitive evidence of tumor metastasis. No tumor tissue is identified in the right adrenal gland.

report_ch: 神经毡背景中多量肿瘤细胞散在分布，大量纤维组织增生玻变，可见坏死及钙化灶。送检组织大片钙化，见部分分化的肿瘤组织，可见残存淋巴组织。阑尾充血水肿。纤维增生玻变及钙化，未见明确幼稚肿瘤组织。

report_ch: 所送冰冻组织见神经纤维及较成熟的神经节细胞。未见神经母细胞等恶性肿瘤成分。冰冻肠系膜淋巴结组织可见神经纤维背景中散在或小片状分布的成熟或部分成熟的神经节细胞，局灶可见少量部分分化的神经母细胞，可见神经毡。核分裂像未见。脉管内见肿瘤细胞。边缘可见残存淋巴滤泡。送检5枚淋巴结中4枚见肿瘤转移。冰冻大网膜送检组织淋巴结1枚，未见明确肿瘤细胞浸润。
report_en: The submitted frozen tissue shows nerve fibers and relatively mature ganglion cells. No malignant components such as neuroblastoma are observed. In the frozen mesenteric lymph node tissue, scattered or small clusters of mature or partially mature ganglion cells are seen within a nerve fiber background. Focally, a small number of partially differentiated neuroblasts are observed, along with neuropil. No mitotic figures are seen. Tumor cells are present within the blood vessels. Residual lymphoid follicles are noted at the margins. Tumor metastasis is identified in 4 out of 5 submitted lymph nodes. In the submitted frozen omental tissue, one lymph node is examined, and no definite tumor cell infiltration is observed.

report_ch: 组织部分区域显示神经纤维稀少，小圆形肿瘤细胞呈片分布，可见神经毡及菊形团结构。局灶可见较薄的纤维间隔。部分区域显示神经纤维丰富，多见钙化。左肾静脉旁淋巴结、腹主动脉淋巴结见肿瘤转移。肝门淋巴结未见明确肿瘤组织。瘤旁组织未见明确肿瘤。
report_en: The tissue in some areas shows sparse nerve fibers, with small round tumor cells distributed in sheets, and the presence of neuropil and rosette structures. Thin fibrous septa are observed locally. Some areas display abundant nerve fibers with frequent calcification. Tumor metastasis is seen in the lymph nodes adjacent to the left renal vein and the abdominal aorta lymph nodes. No definite tumor tissue is identified in the hepatic portal lymph nodes. No clear tumor is observed in the adjacent tissue.

report: 组织为淋巴结，结构完全破坏，基本被大量小圆形肿瘤细胞取代,部分见可见神经纤维分化。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少，核仁明显。脉管内见瘤栓。

report_en: The tissue shows areas with sparse nerve fibers and sheets of small round tumor cells, with visible neuropil and rosette structures. Other areas display abundant nerve fibers. There is no transitional zone between the two regions, and locally thin fibrous septa are observed. Necrosis and calcification are commonly seen. Tumor emboli are present within blood vessels.

report_ch: 肿瘤细胞弥漫成片或绕血管分布，细胞中-大核浆比高、胞浆少且异型，核分裂像易见。大片坏死出血。局灶脉管内见瘤栓。包膜见肿瘤累及。肾盂及输尿管结构不清。胰腺旁淋巴结见肿瘤转移（9/11）。下腔静脉旁淋巴结见肿瘤转移（2/2）。
report_en: The tumor cells diffusely form sheets or are distributed around blood vessels, with medium to large nuclei, high nuclear-to-cytoplasmic ratio, scant cytoplasm, and atypia. Mitotic figures are easily observed. Extensive necrosis and hemorrhage are present. Focal tumor emboli are seen within blood vessels. Tumor involvement is noted in the capsule. The structures of the renal pelvis and ureter are indistinct. Tumor metastasis is observed in the peripancreatic lymph nodes (9/11). Tumor metastasis is also seen in the lymph nodes adjacent to the inferior vena cava (2/2).

Some lymph nodes show necrosis and fusion.

report_en: The tumor tissue exhibits extensive hemorrhage and necrosis, with small round tumor cells arranged in clusters or scattered distribution. The tumor cells have scant cytoplasm, round nuclei, deep staining, and inconspicuous nucleoli. Occasional intranuclear inclusions are observed.

瘤旁：送检纤维脂肪组织，可见小灶肿瘤组织。

report_en: The tumor tissue exhibits extensive hemorrhage, necrosis, and calcification. Small foci of tumor cells are observed, with hyperchromatic nuclei and scant cytoplasm. Neuropil and a small amount of adrenal tissue are visible. Extensive hemorrhage, necrosis, and calcification are present in the lymph nodes adjacent to the renal hilum, with evidence of tumor metastasis. Hemorrhage, necrosis, and calcification are also observed in the para-aortic lymph nodes, along with tumor metastasis. Small foci of tumor tissue are identified in the peritumoral fibroadipose tissue.

Partial metastasis is present in the muscle lymph nodes. No tumor metastasis is found in the perirenal adipose tissue.

肿瘤：所送组织显示多灶坏死、出血、钙化，坏死组织占切片面积约20-30%。肿瘤组织富含小圆形肿瘤细胞，瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。神经纤维稀少。肿瘤边缘见少许肾上腺组织。瘤周：送检纤维脂肪及少量神经组织，热反应显著，未见明确肿瘤组织。肝门淋巴结：淋巴结见肿瘤转移伴坏死、钙化（约为1/1）。腹主动脉旁淋巴结：淋巴结见肿瘤转移伴坏死、钙化（约为4/4）。右肾静脉及下腔静脉夹角淋巴结：淋巴结见肿瘤转移伴坏死、钙化（约为2/2）。阑尾充血水肿。

report_ch: 肿瘤组织多灶坏死、出血、钙化，坏死占20-30%。富含小圆形肿瘤细胞，核浓染，胞浆稀少。肿瘤边缘见少许肾上腺组织。肝门、腹主动脉旁、右肾静脉及下腔静脉夹角淋巴结均见肿瘤转移伴坏死、钙化。阑尾充血水肿。
report_en: The tumor tissue exhibits multifocal necrosis, hemorrhage, and calcification, with necrosis accounting for 20-30%. It is rich in small round tumor cells with hyperchromatic nuclei and scant cytoplasm. A small amount of adrenal tissue is observed at the tumor margin. Tumor metastases with necrosis and calcification are seen in the lymph nodes of the hepatic portal, para-aortic region, right renal vein, and the angle between the inferior vena cava. The appendix shows congestion and edema.

report: 所送肿瘤组织与肾上腺比邻。肿瘤组织凝固性坏死、钙化，仅局灶可见少量中等分化的肿瘤细胞。组织细胞增生，泡沫细胞多见。肾上腺内未见肿瘤细胞。“肝门淋巴结”、“胰头淋巴结”可见被膜下窦中散在Syn阳性的肿瘤细胞。
report_ch: 肿瘤组织与肾上腺比邻，可见凝固性坏死、钙化，局灶有少量中等分化肿瘤细胞。组织细胞增生，泡沫细胞多见。肾上腺内未见肿瘤细胞。肝门淋巴结、胰头淋巴结被膜下窦中散在Syn阳性肿瘤细胞。
report_en: The tumor tissue is adjacent to the adrenal gland, showing coagulative necrosis and calcification, with a small number of moderately differentiated tumor cells focally. Histiocytic proliferation is observed, with foam cells being common. No tumor cells are found within the adrenal gland. Scattered Syn-positive tumor cells are present in the subcapsular sinuses of the hepatic hilar lymph nodes and pancreatic head lymph nodes.

report_en: The tumor tissue shows small round tumor cells. Some tumor cells are larger in size with eosinophilic cytoplasm and visible nucleoli. Nerve fibers are observed accounting for approximately 30% of the area.

report: 肿瘤组织显示小圆形肿瘤细胞小片状分布。神经纤维不明显。可见少量神经毡。MKI指数约1-2%。
report_ch: 肿瘤组织显示小圆形肿瘤细胞小片状分布。
report_en: The tumor tissue shows small sheets of small round tumor cells.

report:
肿瘤组织显示神经纤维稀少，可见神经毡、菊形团及小圆形肿瘤细胞，MKI指数约4-5%。
瘤旁组织可见肿瘤组织浸润。
report_ch: 肿瘤组织显示神经纤维稀少，可见神经毡、菊形团及小圆形肿瘤细胞。瘤旁组织可见肿瘤组织浸润。
report_en: The tumor tissue shows sparse nerve fibers, with visible neuropil, rosettes, and small round tumor cells. Infiltration of tumor tissue is observed in the adjacent tissue.

report: 肿瘤组织显示神经纤维稀少。可见丰富的神经毡及小圆形肿瘤细胞。可见坏死钙化。核分裂指数约5-6%。
report_ch: 肿瘤组织显示神经纤维稀少。可见丰富的神经毡及小圆形肿瘤细胞。可见坏死钙化。
report_en: The tumor tissue shows sparse nerve fibers. Abundant neuropil and small round tumor cells are visible. Necrosis and calcification are observed.

report: 组织显示神经毡结构中较多小圆形肿瘤细胞。神经纤维稀少。MKI指数约5%。
report_ch: 神经毡结构中较多小圆形肿瘤细胞。神经纤维稀少。
report_en: There are numerous small round tumor cells in the neuropil structure. Nerve fibers are sparse.

report: 组织可见大量纤维组织增生，其间见小团小圆形肿瘤细胞，瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆稀少，部分胞浆嗜酸性改变，伴大片坏死及钙化。另送检腹主动脉旁组织中见神经纤维及节细胞，并见小团小圆细胞，细胞核浓染，胞浆稀少（组织挤压严重）。
report_ch: 大量纤维组织增生，其间见小团小圆形肿瘤细胞，瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆稀少，部分胞浆嗜酸性改变，伴大片坏死及钙化。另送检腹主动脉旁组织中见小团小圆细胞，细胞核浓染，胞浆稀少。
report_en: There is extensive fibrous tissue proliferation with small clusters of small round tumor cells observed within. The tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei, scant cytoplasm, and partial eosinophilic cytoplasmic changes, accompanied by extensive necrosis and calcification. Additionally, small clusters of small round cells with hyperchromatic nuclei and scant cytoplasm are observed in the submitted para-aortic tissue.

report: 组织显示肾上腺周围较多坏死及纤维组织增生。局灶见少量小圆形肿瘤细胞。瘤细胞体积小，核圆，胞浆稀少。可见神经原纤维。未见菊形团及明确神经节细胞。淋巴结结构部分破坏，被膜下窦中肿瘤细胞浸润。
report_ch: 肾上腺周围较多坏死及纤维组织增生。局灶见少量小圆形肿瘤细胞。瘤细胞体积小，核圆，胞浆稀少。淋巴结结构部分破坏，被膜下窦中肿瘤细胞浸润。
report_en: There is extensive necrosis and fibrous tissue hyperplasia around the adrenal gland. A small number of small round tumor cells are observed focally. The tumor cells are small in size, with round nuclei and scant cytoplasm. The lymph node structure is partially destroyed, with tumor cell infiltration in the subcapsular sinus.

report: 组织显示骨小梁间较多中性粒细胞浸润及纤维组织增生。多灶可见小圆形肿瘤细胞浸润。瘤细胞胞浆稀少，核浓染。软组织坏死明显，其间见较多中性粒细胞及核碎屑。可见灶性挤压变形的肿瘤细胞。
report_ch: 骨小梁间较多中性粒细胞浸润及纤维组织增生。多灶可见小圆形肿瘤细胞浸润。瘤细胞胞浆稀少，核浓染。软组织坏死明显，其间见较多中性粒细胞及核碎屑。可见灶性挤压变形的肿瘤细胞。
report_en: There is significant infiltration of neutrophils and fibrous tissue proliferation between the bone trabeculae. Multifocal infiltration of small round tumor cells is observed. The tumor cells have scant cytoplasm and hyperchromatic nuclei. Soft tissue necrosis is prominent, with numerous neutrophils and nuclear debris present. Focal areas of crushed and distorted tumor cells are visible.

report:
骶尾部、右侧臀部组织可见神经纤维背景中散在或小灶分布的较成熟或分化中的神经节细胞。未见神经母细胞聚集。未见核分裂像。右髂血管旁淋巴结、右侧腹股沟淋巴结可见神经纤维背景中散在或小灶分布的较成熟或分化中的神经节细胞，可见残留淋巴组织，未见神经母细胞聚集。局灶脉管内见肿瘤组织，为分化中的神经节细胞成分。
-4号片
report_ch: 骶尾部、右侧臀部组织可见神经纤维背景中散在或小灶分布的较成熟或分化中的细胞。右髂血管旁淋巴结、右侧腹股沟淋巴结可见神经纤维背景中散在或小灶分布的较成熟或分化中的细胞，可见残留淋巴组织。局灶脉管内见肿瘤组织。
report_en: Tissue from the sacrococcygeal region and the right buttock shows scattered or small foci of relatively mature or differentiating cells within a neurofibrous background. The right iliac vascular lymph nodes and right inguinal lymph nodes exhibit scattered or small foci of relatively mature or differentiating cells within a neurofibrous background, with residual lymphoid tissue observed. Focal tumor tissue is present within the blood vessels.

report: 组织可见出血，纤维玻变及钙化，可见含铁血黄素沉积，占切片面积约5-10%。另见大量小圆形或椭圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞胞浆稀少，核圆或椭圆，核染色质丰富。偶见病理核分裂。未见明确神经毡。左侧腹膜后淋巴结见肿瘤转移（4/4）。左输尿管未见肿瘤组织。肾周脂肪组织中见淋巴结一枚，其间见肿瘤组织。
report_ch: 组织出血，纤维玻变及钙化，含铁血黄素沉积。见大量小圆形或椭圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布，胞浆稀少，核圆或椭圆，染色质丰富，偶见病理核分裂。左侧腹膜后淋巴结肿瘤转移（4/4）。左输尿管未见肿瘤。肾周脂肪组织中淋巴结见肿瘤。
report_en: Tissue hemorrhage, fibrous hyaline degeneration and calcification, hemosiderin deposition. Numerous small round or oval tumor cells are diffusely distributed, with scant cytoplasm, round or oval nuclei, abundant chromatin, and occasional pathological mitoses. Tumor metastasis in left retroperitoneal lymph nodes (4/4). No tumor is seen in the left ureter. Lymph nodes in the perirenal adipose tissue show tumor involvement.

report: 组织坏死钙化明显。可见神经纤维背景中，大量小圆形肿瘤细胞团状分布。大部分瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆稀少。部分胞浆丰富、可见神经原纤维。所送“淋巴结”为纤维脂肪组织中肿瘤细胞呈结节状分布。
report_ch: 组织坏死钙化明显。可见神经纤维背景中，大量小圆形肿瘤细胞团状分布。大部分瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆稀少。部分胞浆丰富、可见神经原纤维。纤维脂肪组织中肿瘤细胞呈结节状分布。
report_en: Tissue necrosis and calcification are evident. Within the neurofibrillary background, numerous small round tumor cells are distributed in clusters. Most tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei and scant cytoplasm. Some cells have abundant cytoplasm with visible neurofibrils. Tumor cells are distributed in nodular patterns within fibroadipose tissue.

report:
组织可见坏死及出血，其间见小圆形肿瘤细胞巢团状或小片状分布。瘤细胞胞浆缺如，核圆，核染色质丰富，血管丰富。未见明确神经毡。可见细胞凋亡及病理核分裂。MKI指数中等。
2022.11.17
report_ch: 组织坏死及出血，其间见小圆形肿瘤细胞巢团状或小片状分布。瘤细胞胞浆缺如，核圆，核染色质丰富，血管丰富。可见细胞凋亡及病理核分裂。
report_en: Tissue necrosis and hemorrhage are observed, with small round tumor cell nests or small sheets distributed within. The tumor cells lack cytoplasm, have round nuclei with abundant chromatin, and are rich in blood vessels. Apoptosis and pathological mitoses are visible.

report:

report_ch: 骨小梁见小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫或灶性分布。瘤细胞胞浆缺如，核圆，核染色质丰富。大部分区域挤压严重，细胞结构不清。
report_en: Trabeculae show diffuse or focal distribution of small round tumor cells. The tumor cells lack cytoplasm, have round nuclei, and abundant nuclear chromatin. In most areas, severe compression is observed, and cellular structures are unclear.

report_en: Tumor cells are diffusely distributed in a myxoid background, with abundant eosinophilic cytoplasm, hyperchromatic nuclei, and inconspicuous nucleoli. Locally, rosette-like structures are observed.

report_en: Tumor cells are diffusely distributed. Focally, a small number of small round tumor cells are observed, with scant cytoplasm, round nuclei, and abundant nuclear chromatin.

report: 组织可见肿瘤细胞弥漫或团块分布，周围血管充血出血。瘤细胞核部分泡状，胞浆缺如或稀少，可见核仁。核分裂像易见，高MKI指数。

report_en: Tumor cells are diffusely or in clusters distributed, with surrounding vascular congestion and hemorrhage. Some tumor cell nuclei are vesicular, with absent or scant cytoplasm, and nucleoli are visible. Mitotic figures are readily observed.

report: 肿瘤组织显示部分区域有丰富的神经纤维，肿瘤细胞明显的节细胞分化。部分区域神经纤维稀少，神经毡多见，肿瘤细胞呈小圆形。坏死、钙化及纤维化区域约占肿瘤细胞20%。肿瘤组织与肾上腺关系密切。可见肿瘤组织脉管浸润。
report_ch: 肿瘤组织部分区域有丰富的神经纤维，部分区域神经纤维稀少，神经毡多见，肿瘤细胞呈小圆形。坏死、钙化及纤维化区域约占肿瘤细胞20%。肿瘤组织与肾上腺关系密切。可见肿瘤组织脉管浸润。
report_en: Tumor tissue exhibits abundant nerve fibers in some areas and sparse nerve fibers in others, with frequent neuropil. The tumor cells are small and round. Necrosis, calcification, and fibrotic areas account for approximately 20% of the tumor tissue. The tumor is closely associated with the adrenal gland. Vascular invasion by the tumor tissue is observed.

report: 示神经毡背景中见大量神经母细胞及各种分化程度的神经节细胞。结节局部切缘见肿瘤组织。

report_en: Tumor tissue is seen at the local resection margin of the nodule.

report_en: Tumor tissue necrosis accompanied by fibrous tissue proliferation and collagenization. Some tumor cells appear small and round.

report:
淋巴结内均可见肿瘤组织富含小圆形肿瘤细胞，瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少，可见神经毡。神经纤维稀少。高MKI指数。灶性坏死钙化。

report_en: Tumor tissue rich in small round tumor cells is observed within the lymph node. The tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei, absent or scant cytoplasm, and neuropil is visible. Focal necrosis and calcification are present.

report: “肿瘤袋”组织可见神经纤维背景中，大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。部分可见神经原纤维。高度核分裂指数（5%）。

report_en: Tumor tissue shows a background of nerve fibers with a diffuse distribution of numerous small round tumor cells. The tumor cells have hyperchromatic nuclei and absent or scant cytoplasm. Some neurofibrils are visible. High mitotic index.

report: 肿瘤组织可见神经纤维背景中，大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少，部分可见神经原纤维。肿瘤坏死钙化，纤维组织增生，淋巴结中科肿瘤浸润，肿瘤周边可见肾上腺组织。
report_ch: 肿瘤组织可见神经纤维背景中，大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少，部分可见神经原纤维。肿瘤坏死钙化，纤维组织增生，淋巴结中见肿瘤浸润，肿瘤周边可见肾上腺组织。
report_en: Tumor tissue shows a background of nerve fibers with a large number of small round tumor cells diffusely distributed. The tumor cells have hyperchromatic nuclei, absent or scant cytoplasm, and some exhibit neurofibrils. Tumor necrosis with calcification, fibrous tissue proliferation, and tumor infiltration in lymph nodes are observed. Adrenal tissue is visible at the periphery of the tumor.

report:

Necrosis, calcification, and fibrosis account for approximately 20% of the tumor tissue. Tumor cells are observed within blood vessels. Tumor metastasis is present in the surrounding lymph nodes.

report_ch: 肿瘤组织可见丰富的神经纤维背景中散在或小片状分布的小圆形肿瘤细胞。核分裂像可见。肿瘤细胞坏死明显。瘤旁组织中可见小圆形肿瘤细胞。
report_en: Tumor tissue shows scattered or small patchy distributions of small round tumor cells within a rich neurofiber background. Mitotic figures are visible. Tumor cell necrosis is evident. Small round tumor cells are observed in the peritumoral tissue.

report: 1袋肿瘤所送组织可见神经纤维背景中散在或小片状分布的成熟或部分成熟的神经节细胞。可见巢状分布的神经毡。为混合型节细胞性神经母细胞瘤成分，约占切片面积90%。局灶见小圆形肿瘤细胞片状分布，瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。核分裂像可见，中等MKI指数。为分化差型神经母细胞瘤成分，约占切片面积5-10%。2袋淋巴结未见肿瘤转移。3袋肾周脂肪送检脂肪组织未见肿瘤累及，淋巴结一枚未见转移，见小灶肾上腺组织。
report_ch: 肿瘤组织可见神经纤维背景中散在或小片状分布的成熟或部分成熟细胞。可见巢状分布的神经毡。为混合型节细胞性神经母细胞瘤成分，约占切片面积90%。局灶见小圆形肿瘤细胞片状分布，瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。核分裂像可见。为分化差型神经母细胞瘤成分，约占切片面积5-10%。淋巴结未见肿瘤转移。肾周脂肪组织未见肿瘤累及，淋巴结未见转移，见小灶肾上腺组织。
report_en: Tumor tissue shows scattered or small sheet-like distribution of mature or partially mature cells within a neurofibrillary background. Nests of neuropil are observed. This represents the mixed ganglioneuroblastoma component, accounting for approximately 90% of the sectional area. Focally, small round tumor cells are arranged in sheets, with hyperchromatic nuclei and absent or scant cytoplasm. Mitotic figures are visible. This corresponds to the poorly differentiated neuroblastoma component, comprising about 5-10% of the sectional area. No tumor metastasis is seen in the lymph nodes. The perirenal adipose tissue shows no tumor involvement, no metastasis is observed in the lymph nodes, and small foci of adrenal tissue are noted.

report: 组织可见肿瘤组织坏死钙化明显。神经纤维背景中散在小圆形肿瘤细胞。较多成熟或部分成熟的神经节细胞。所送“肾门淋巴结”为肿瘤组织，未见明确淋巴结正常结构。肾上腺结构尚完整。
report_ch: 肿瘤组织坏死钙化明显。神经纤维背景中散在小圆形肿瘤细胞。肾门淋巴结为肿瘤组织，未见明确淋巴结正常结构。肾上腺结构尚完整。
report_en: Tumor tissue shows significant necrosis and calcification. Small round tumor cells are scattered within the neurofiber background. The renal hilar lymph node is replaced by tumor tissue, with no clear normal lymph node structure identified. The adrenal gland structure remains largely intact.

report:
组织显示肿瘤组织可见小圆形肿瘤细胞，瘤细胞核浓染，部分胞浆稀少，部分可见胞浆。可见神经毡。神经纤维较多。低MKI指数。灶性坏死钙化。肿瘤边缘见少量肾上腺组织。
-2号片
report_ch: 肿瘤组织可见小圆形肿瘤细胞，核浓染，部分胞浆稀少。可见神经毡及神经纤维。灶性坏死钙化。肿瘤边缘见少量肾上腺组织。
report_en: Tumor tissue shows small round tumor cells with hyperchromatic nuclei and scant cytoplasm in some areas. Neuropil and nerve fibers are visible. Focal necrosis and calcification are present. A small amount of adrenal tissue is seen at the tumor margin.

report:
组织中见肿瘤组织部分出血坏死，富含小圆形肿瘤细胞，瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少，可见神经毡。局灶钙化。脉管内可见瘤栓。核分裂易见，中等MKI指数。局灶可见残存淋巴滤泡。
-1号片
report_ch: 组织中见肿瘤组织部分出血坏死，富含小圆形肿瘤细胞，瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。局灶钙化。脉管内可见瘤栓。核分裂易见。局灶可见残存淋巴滤泡。
report_en: Tumor tissue with focal hemorrhage and necrosis is observed in the tissue, rich in small round tumor cells. The tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei, with absent or scant cytoplasm. Focal calcification is present. Tumor emboli are visible within blood vessels. Mitotic figures are readily observed. Residual lymphoid follicles are seen in focal areas.

report:
肿瘤1，肿瘤2，肿瘤3：所送组织显示丰富的神经纤维背景中，见散在或灶性分布的神经节细胞。部分神经节细胞分化成熟，部分神经节细胞未完全成熟。部分区域边界欠清。
瘤旁：纤维脂肪中见少许肿瘤组织。
-2号片
report_ch: 肿瘤组织：丰富的神经纤维背景中，见散在或灶性分布细胞。部分区域边界欠清。瘤旁纤维脂肪中见少许肿瘤组织。
report_en: Tumor tissue: Scattered or focal distribution of cells is observed within a rich neurofiber background. The boundaries are indistinct in some areas. A small amount of tumor tissue is seen in the adjacent fibrofatty tissue.

report:
肿瘤：所送组织显示大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布，大片坏死，局部钙化。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。病理性核分裂少见，中等MKI指数。可见神经原纤维。可见部分分化的神经母细胞瘤成分。肿瘤边缘见少量肾上腺组织。网膜未见明确肿瘤组织。
肾门淋巴结：见肿瘤转移伴坏死及化疗后反应（约为8/8）。
腹主动脉旁淋巴结：见肿瘤转移伴坏死及化疗后反应（约为9/9）。

report_ch:
肿瘤：小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布，大片坏死，局部钙化。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆稀少。肿瘤边缘见少量肾上腺组织。网膜未见明确肿瘤组织。
肾门淋巴结：见肿瘤转移伴坏死及化疗后反应。
腹主动脉旁淋巴结：见肿瘤转移伴坏死及化疗后反应。
report_en:
Tumor: Diffuse distribution of small round tumor cells with extensive necrosis and focal calcification. Tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei and scant cytoplasm. A small amount of adrenal tissue is observed at the tumor margin. No definite tumor tissue is identified in the omentum.  
Renal hilar lymph nodes: Tumor metastasis with necrosis and post-chemotherapy changes are observed.  
Para-aortic lymph nodes: Tumor metastasis with necrosis and post-chemotherapy changes are observed.

report:
肿瘤：所送组织显示丰富的神经纤维背景中，见散在或灶性分布的神经节细胞。部分神经节细胞分化成熟，部分神经节细胞未完全成熟。
腹主动脉旁淋巴结：送检淋巴结未见肿瘤组织（约0/4）。
肠系膜淋巴结：送检淋巴结未见肿瘤组织（约0/2）。

report_ch: 肿瘤：丰富的神经纤维背景中见散在或灶性分布细胞。腹主动脉旁淋巴结未见肿瘤组织。肠系膜淋巴结未见肿瘤组织。
report_en: Tumor: Scattered or focal distribution of cells is observed within a rich neurofiber background. No tumor tissue is found in the para-aortic lymph nodes. No tumor tissue is found in the mesenteric lymph nodes.

report:
瘤体：所送组织显示广泛出血、坏死及钙化、纤维组织增生伴玻变，坏死玻变钙化区约占切片面积70-80%。局灶见肿瘤组织富含小圆形肿瘤细胞，瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少，可见神经毡。肿瘤边缘见少许肾上腺组织，其内见肿瘤组织。
髂血管旁淋巴结：送检散碎组织见淋巴结组织及肿瘤组织伴坏死及钙化，淋巴结结构欠清（约4/4）。
腹主动脉旁淋巴结：送检散碎组织见淋巴结组织及肿瘤组织伴坏死及钙化，淋巴结结构欠清（约4/4）。
肾门淋巴结（左）：送检散碎组织见淋巴结组织及肿瘤组织伴坏死及钙化，淋巴结结构欠清（约3/3）。
淋巴结髂血管分叉处：送检散碎组织见淋巴结组织及肿瘤组织伴坏死及钙化，淋巴结结构欠清（约2/2）。
瘤旁：送检肌纤维，未见明确肿瘤组织。
肾周脂肪（左）：小灶热反应重且挤压变形组织中见少许异型细胞，散在含铁血黄素沉积。脂肪、肌纤维及血管组织中未见明确肿瘤组织。
-3号片
report_ch: 瘤体：组织广泛出血、坏死及钙化、纤维组织增生伴玻变，坏死玻变钙化区约占切片面积70-80%。局灶见肿瘤组织富含小圆形肿瘤细胞，核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。肿瘤边缘见少许肾上腺组织，其内见肿瘤组织。髂血管旁、腹主动脉旁、肾门及髂血管分叉处淋巴结均见肿瘤组织伴坏死及钙化，结构欠清。瘤旁肌纤维未见明确肿瘤组织。肾周脂肪见少许异型细胞，散在含铁血黄素沉积，未见明确肿瘤组织。
report_en: Tumor: The tissue shows extensive hemorrhage, necrosis, calcification, and fibrous tissue hyperplasia with hyaline degeneration. The areas of necrosis, hyaline degeneration, and calcification account for approximately 70-80% of the section area. Focally, the tumor tissue is rich in small round tumor cells with hyperchromatic nuclei and absent or scant cytoplasm. A small amount of adrenal tissue is observed at the tumor margin, with tumor tissue present within it. Tumor tissue with necrosis and calcification is identified in the lymph nodes adjacent to the iliac vessels, para-aortic region, renal hilum, and iliac vessel bifurcation, with unclear structural details. No definitive tumor tissue is observed in the muscle fibers adjacent to the tumor. A few atypical cells are noted in the perirenal fat, with scattered hemosiderin deposition, and no definitive tumor tissue is identified.

report: 组织可见纤维包膜，包膜内大量小圆形、短梭形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布，瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少，部分可见神经原纤维样结构，病理性核分裂易见，可见脉管内瘤栓。瘤组织间见散在淋巴组织。
report_ch: 纤维包膜内大量小圆形、短梭形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布，瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少，病理性核分裂易见，可见脉管内瘤栓。瘤组织间见散在淋巴组织。
report_en: Within the fibrous capsule, a large number of small round and short spindle-shaped tumor cells are diffusely distributed. The tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei, with absent or scant cytoplasm. Pathological mitoses are readily observed, and intravascular tumor thrombi are visible. Scattered lymphoid tissue is seen among the tumor tissue.

report: 淋巴结组织内可见神经纤维背景中，大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少，部分可见神经原纤维。肿瘤内可见多灶坏死及钙化。
report_ch: 淋巴结组织内可见神经纤维背景中，大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。肿瘤内可见多灶坏死及钙化。
report_en: Within the lymph node tissue, a large number of small round tumor cells are diffusely distributed against a background of nerve fibers. The tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei and absent or scant cytoplasm. Multiple foci of necrosis and calcification are observed within the tumor.

report: 组织示淋巴结内可见神经纤维背景中，大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。部分可见神经原纤维。
report_ch: 淋巴结内可见神经纤维背景中，大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。
report_en: Within the lymph node, a large number of small round tumor cells are diffusely distributed in a background of nerve fibers. The tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei and absent or scant cytoplasm.

report: 切片显示大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。部分细胞胞浆红染、核偏位。偶见菊形团及神经原纤维。多灶坏死，易见凋亡。MKI指数高。
report_ch: 切片显示大量小圆形肿瘤细胞弥漫分布。瘤细胞核浓染，胞浆缺如或稀少。部分细胞胞浆红染、核偏位。偶见菊形团及神经原纤维。多灶坏死，易见凋亡。
report_en: The section reveals a diffuse distribution of numerous small, round tumor cells. The tumor cells exhibit hyperchromatic nuclei with absent or scant cytoplasm. Some cells display eosinophilic cytoplasm and eccentric nuclei. Occasional rosettes and neurofibrils are observed. There are multifocal necrotic areas, and apoptosis is readily seen.

report: 组织可见出血及纤维组织中散在小灶小圆形肿瘤细胞。瘤细胞胞浆稀少或缺如，核圆，核染色质丰富，可见病理核分裂。中-高MKI指数。
report_ch: 出血及纤维组织中散在小灶小圆形肿瘤细胞。瘤细胞胞浆稀少或缺如，核圆，核染色质丰富，可见病理核分裂。
report_en: Small foci of small round tumor cells are scattered within the hemorrhage and fibrous tissue. The tumor cells exhibit scant or absent cytoplasm, round nuclei with abundant chromatin, and pathological mitotic figures are present.
